NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

506. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-26-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANGELA COOPER.
